title: tanacetum chitralense
intro: Tanacetum chitralense, also known as Chitral daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Tanacetum chitralense is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
